title: Simple Voice Chat TTS
description: A basic extension for simple voice chat that adds text-to-speech.
body:
# Simple Voice Chat TTS
A basic extension for simple voice chat that adds text-to-speech.

## Why?
One of my friends wanted to be able to speak on a [voice chat only modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express).

## How?
It uses a library called freetts, planning on adding more backend libraries later on.
